title: Halal Tandoor Freekeh Salad
description: A smoky and crunchy Dutch-style salad featuring halal-friendly ingredients such as freekeh, roasted garlic, and preserved lemon.

ingredients.name: Tandoori Spices (coriander, cumin, turmeric, garam masala)

instructions: Roast the garlic cloves for about 20 minutes until golden brown and slightly caramelized.
Mix freekeh with a pinch of salt, tossing until evenly coated. Spread on baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread roasted garlic over the freekeh and drizzle with pomegranate molasses. Toss gently to combine.
Combine tandoori spices in a small bowl with 1/2 teaspoon salt. Mix into the freekeh mixture, dividing evenly among four plates.
Chop red onion finely and add it on top of each serving.
Finish with fresh mint leaves and preserved lemon zest on each plate.
Serve immediately as an appetizer or snack.
